page_content:
Prerequisite: ARTT355 and ARTT356.

Credit Only Granted for. ARTT361 or ARTT489L.

Formerly: ARTT489L.

ARTT369 Special Topics in Study Abroad III (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

ARTT370 Elements of Digital Media (3 Credits)

Exploration of image creation and manipulation, interactivity, and linkages between digital audio and video. Emphasis on issues in contemporary digital art.
